allow: Bash(gh api:*)
WebFetch(domain:docs.n8n.io)
WebFetch(domain:community.n8n.io)
Bash(python3 -m py_compile test_b2c_webhook.py && echo "✅ test_b2c_webhook.py OK")
Bash(node --check n8n_b2c_code_node.js 2>&1 && echo "✅ n8n_b2c_code_node.js syntax OK" || echo "⚠️ Note: n8n-specific globals \($input, this.helpers\) cause node --check to fail outside n8n context")
Bash(node --check n8n_code_node.js 2>&1 | head -3)
Bash(ls -la /opt/projects/cartrack-leadgen/*.py /opt/projects/cartrack-leadgen/*.js /opt/projects/cartrack-leadgen/notion_config.json)
Bash(python3 -m py_compile create_b2c_database.py && echo "✅ syntax OK" && uv run create_b2c_database.py)

Bash(scp /tmp/b2b_skill.md pi4:/tmp/b2b_skill.md && scp /tmp/b2c_skill.md pi4:/tmp/b2c_skill.md && ssh pi4 "
  mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2b-leadgen
  mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen
  cp /tmp/b2b_skill.md ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2b-leadgen/SKILL.md
  cp /tmp/b2c_skill.md ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen/SKILL.md
  rm -rf ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-leadgen
  echo 'Done'
")
Bash(git add:*)
Bash(ssh pi4:*)
Bash(ssh bigtorig:*)

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
config = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
skills = config.get\('skills', {}\).get\('entries', {}\)
if 'agentmail' in skills:
    del skills['agentmail']
    print\(json.dumps\(config, indent=2\)\)
" > /tmp/openclaw_fixed.json && echo "Fixed" && python3 -m json.tool /tmp/openclaw_fixed.json > /dev/null && echo "Valid JSON")

Bash(mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen && scp pi4:~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/b2c_run.py ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/ && scp pi4:~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/gumtree_scraper.js ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/ && scp pi4:~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen/SKILL.md ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen/ && scp pi4:~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/b2c-state.json ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/ && scp pi4:~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/b2c-seed-urls.json ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/ 2>/dev/null || true && echo "All copied")

Bash(python3 -m py_compile ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/b2c_run.py && echo "b2c_run.py OK" && node --check ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/gumtree_scraper.js && echo "gumtree_scraper.js OK" && ls ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/ && ls ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen/)
Bash(cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && npm install playwright playwright-extra puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth 2>&1 | tail -3 && npx playwright install chromium 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(cp /tmp/gumtree_spy.js ~/.openclaw/workspace/gumtree_spy.js && cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && node gumtree_spy.js 2>&1 && rm gumtree_spy.js)
Bash(cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && python3 scripts/b2c_run.py 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
config = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
gateway = config.setdefault\('gateway', {}\)
controlUi = gateway.setdefault\('controlUi', {}\)
origins = controlUi.setdefault\('allowedOrigins', []\)
origin = 'https://bigtorig.tailfd6deb.ts.net'
if origin not in origins:
    origins.append\(origin\)
print\(json.dumps\(config, indent=2\)\)
" > /tmp/openclaw_origins.json && python3 -m json.tool /tmp/openclaw_origins.json > /dev/null && cp /tmp/openclaw_origins.json ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json && echo "Done")
Bash(systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway.service && sleep 4 && systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway.service)

Bash(cp /opt/projects/cartrack-leadgen/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen/SKILL.md /tmp/b2c_skill.md && cp /tmp/b2c_skill.md ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen/SKILL.md && scp /tmp/b2c_skill.md pi4:~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cogstack-b2c-leadgen/SKILL.md && echo "Deployed to bigtorig + Pi4")
mcp__claude_ai_bigtorig-monitor__read_file
